description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a paved surface. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, and a combination of white and black exterior walls. The front entrance is marked by a small overhang and a red accent, while the rear includes a spacious patio area. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and a detached, curved swimming pool is situated nearby. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a detached curved swimming pool, surrounded by landscaped trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, black and white facade, and the detached curved swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white exterior, red-accented entrance, and surrounding trees, with the pool visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extensive floor-to-ceiling windows and the flat roof, with landscaping and a small conical tree in the background.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view showing the black roof sections, the pool to the right, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
